title: Discuss time pressure
subtitle: Why people feel busy.
overview: Module: Work, Study, and Society. B2 Bridge moves from strong B1 output into abstract thinking, source reaction, nuanced opinions, natural style, and longer spoken independence.

sections.title: B2 bridge focus
rows: Time pressure is often connected to expectations, technology, and personal habits.
时间压力常常和期待、技术、个人习惯有关。
B2 bridge frame: describe the situation, analyze the cause, discuss impact, and propose a realistic response.
B2 Bridge 框架：描述情况、分析原因、讨论影响，并提出现实回应。
解释为什么人们觉得忙。
Many people feel busy not only because they have many tasks, but because messages, notifications, and expectations make everything feel urgent.
很多人觉得忙，不只是因为任务多，而是因为消息、通知和期待让一切都感觉紧急。

items.en: Time pressure is often connected to expectations, technology, and personal habits.
items.zh: 时间压力常常和期待、技术、个人习惯有关。

items.en: B2 bridge frame: describe the situation, analyze the cause, discuss impact, and propose a realistic response.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 框架：描述情况、分析原因、讨论影响，并提出现实回应。

items.en: Many people feel busy not only because they have many tasks, but because messages, notifications, and expectations make everything feel urgent.
items.zh: 很多人觉得忙，不只是因为任务多，而是因为消息、通知和期待让一切都感觉紧急。

items.en: I will not rush to sound advanced; I will make the idea clear first.
items.zh: 我不会急着显得高级；我会先把意思说清楚。

items.en: Then I will add nuance: a condition, a limit, a contrast, or a counterpoint.
items.zh: 然后我会加入细腻度：条件、限制、对比或反方观点。

items.en: If the sentence feels too heavy, I can paraphrase it in simpler spoken English.
items.zh: 如果句子感觉太沉重，我可以用更简单的口语英语改说。

items.en: A B2 answer should sound organized, flexible, and alive.
items.zh: B2 回答应该听起来有组织、灵活、有生命力。

items.en: I will record one answer and improve the structure, not only the grammar.
items.zh: 我会录一个回答，并改进结构，而不只是语法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 解释为什么人们觉得忙。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Many people feel busy not only because they have many tasks, but because messages, notifications, and expectations make everything feel urgent.
lines.zh: 很多人觉得忙，不只是因为任务多，而是因为消息、通知和期待让一切都感觉紧急。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add nuance or a limitation?
lines.zh: 你能加入细腻度或限制条件吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a condition, a contrast, or one fair counterpoint.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入一个条件、一个对比或一个公平的反方观点。

items.zh: 解释为什么人们觉得忙。

items.en: Answer once in four sentences, then expand it to six or seven sentences.
items.zh: 先用四句话回答一次，然后扩展到六七句话。

items.en: Add one phrase that shows nuance: generally, however, that said, or it depends.
items.zh: 加入一个显示细腻度的短语：generally、however、that said 或 it depends。

items.en: Record the answer and check whether the structure is easy to follow.
items.zh: 录下回答，并检查结构是否容易跟上。

items.en: Reuse the best sentence tomorrow in a new topic.
items.zh: 明天在一个新话题中再次使用最好的句子。
